Bus Timings

X64 Bus Shcedule Al Baraha Bus Station to Ras Al Khor Terminus

July 12, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus X64 is a vital part of Dubai’s public transportation network, offering a comprehensive link between key areas and neighborhoods. This bus route provides convenient travel options for both residents and visitors, connecting Al Baraha Bus Station with Ras Al Khor, Terminus.

It serves a wide range of stops, making it an essential choice for those traveling between the bustling commercial centers and residential areas of Dubai. The bus operates throughout the day with regular services, ensuring accessibility and ease of travel for passengers.

Route Name X64
Route Description Al Baraha Bus Station - Ras Al Khor, Terminus
Total Distance Approximately 15 to 22.5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 45 minutes
Operational Hours 05:00 to 21:50 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus X64

Bus X64 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus X64 operates with the following schedule:

From Al Baraha Bus Station From Ras Al Khor, Terminus
05:00 06:12
05:30 06:35
06:00 07:10
06:32 07:40
07:00 08:06
07:17 08:37
07:37 08:56
08:00 09:15
08:20 09:40
08:45 10:12
09:12 10:57
09:35 16:17
10:05 16:47
10:24 17:17
10:42 17:50
16:00 18:20
16:30 18:55
17:00 19:25
17:30 19:55
18:00 20:25
18:30 20:55
19:00 21:20
19:35 21:50
20:05  
20:35  
21:00  
21:30  

Bus X64 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or simply follow this link to access the X64 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus X64 is AED 5. This affordable price offers an economical means of traveling across the entire route, making it a cost-effective choice for both daily commuters and occasional passengers. The pricing structure supports the accessibility of the service to a broad spectrum of travelers, ensuring a budget-friendly option for those navigating the city.

Bus Booking

Tickets for Bus X64 can be purchased directly from the bus or at designated ticketing points. While online booking is not available for Bus X64, passengers can access route information, schedules, and real-time updates through the RTA’s official website or mobile app. This ensures that travelers are well-informed and can plan their journeys effectively.

Bus Route

Bus X64 follows a detailed route that covers numerous important locations across Dubai.

  1. Al Baraha Bus Station

  2. Islamic Institute

  3. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  4. Naif, Intersection

  5. Naif Park

  6. Baniyas Square

  7. Memorial Plaza

  8. Etisalat Head Office

  9. Maktoum Road

  10. DNATA

  11. Garhoud, Intersection

  12. Airport Terminal 1, External

  13. Rashidiya, Village

  14. Hepworth Plastics

  15. Vegetable Market

  16. Ducamz, 1

  17. Ras Al Khor, 9

  1. Tawoon Transportation

  2. Ras Al Khor, Rahmani Trdg.

  3. Ras Al Khor, 4

  4. Ras Al Khor, 2

  5. Ras Al Khor, Terminus

Bus X64 Station Overview

Al Baraha Bus Station

The station is well-equipped with essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time bus schedule updates.

Its strategic location supports the daily transit needs of local residents and businesses, providing convenient access to various commercial and residential areas in Al Baraha. The station’s facilities are designed to accommodate a high volume of passengers, ensuring efficient and comfortable travel experiences.

Intersection of Bus Routes at Burj Nahar Intersection

This central location offers seamless connections between these diverse routes, making it a crucial point for passengers traveling throughout Dubai. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, providing a convenient and efficient travel experience for commuters using these intersecting bus services.

Ras Al Khor, Terminus

This terminus offers essential amenities including sheltered waiting areas and current schedule information, catering to the needs of workers and visitors in the region.

Its location within a significant industrial and business hub ensures easy access to nearby facilities and services. The terminus plays a crucial role in facilitating efficient transportation in Ras Al Khor, supporting both daily commutes and business-related travel.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus X64 travels through several areas in Dubai with notable attractions and points of interest along its route. Here are some highlights: 1.

2.

  1. Memorial Plaza: This area is a site of historical importance, often linked with commemorative events.

  2. Etisalat Head Office: A prominent building associated with Dubai’s telecommunications industry, though not a tourist attraction per se, it’s a landmark in its own right.

  3. Garhoud: Home to various dining and shopping options, contributing to the local flavor of Dubai.

  4. Airport Terminal 1, External: While primarily a transport hub, the surrounding area has various amenities and services for travelers.

  5. Rashidiya Village: A residential area that provides a glimpse into the local lifestyle and community.

  6. Hepworth Plastics: Located near the bus route, this company represents Dubai’s industrial side but may not be a tourist spot.

  7. Vegetable Market: Offers an authentic local experience with fresh produce and local goods, reflecting Dubai’s vibrant market culture.

  8. Ducamz, 1: Known for its diverse range of automotive services and businesses, it’s an area of interest for car enthusiasts.

11.

These stops highlight a mix of local and business landmarks, offering a comprehensive view of Dubai’s urban landscape and its various facets.

Journey Experience

A trip on the X64 bus route from Al Baraha Bus Station to Ras Al Khor Terminus offers passengers a diverse and scenic journey through Dubai’s urban landscape.

As the journey progresses towards Ras Al Khor, passengers will also pass by the Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary, a peaceful nature reserve home to flamingos and other wildlife.

Traveling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can travel to Ras Al Khor, Terminus, the furthest point on the X64 bus route, starting from Al Baraha Bus Station. The fare for this journey ranges from AED 65 to 79, providing a convenient and cost-effective way to reach this destination. Whether you’re exploring the Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary or heading to the terminus for connections to other parts of the city, Careem offers a reliable option for your trip.

In summary, Bus X64 offers a vital connection across Dubai with an extensive route and convenient timings.

The bus route’s coverage of key areas and landmarks ensures that passengers can easily access important destinations throughout Dubai. Whether you’re heading to a commercial hub, residential area, or significant point of interest, Bus X64 provides a practical and efficient travel solution.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 12, 2025.
